questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the experiment plan.
Question: Does sunlight affect growth?
Two identical plants are used; one in sunlight, one in shade.
Question: Why identical plants?
options: Ek Soru 1 — To save money only
Ek Soru 1 — To keep test fair except one variable
Ek Soru 1 — To grow fruit faster
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Fair test için sadece bir değişken farklı olmalıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Read the result summary.
Group A studied with short breaks: average 85
Group B nonstop: average 71
Question: Which conclusion is best?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Breaks always reduce success.
Ek Soru 1 — Short breaks may improve performance.
Ek Soru 1 — Group B studied better.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Veri, aralıklı çalışmanın daha iyi ortalama verdiğini gösteriyor.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the lab rule.
"Wear goggles while handling acids."
Question: Main purpose of this rule is ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Goggles göz güvenliği için kullanılır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the observation.
"As salt concentration increased, boiling point rose slightly."
Question: Which variable changed?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Artan değişken olarak salt concentration belirtilmiştir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]
questions.ipucu: Increased kelimesinin bağlı olduğu ifadeyi bul.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the test context.
A student claims plants don't need water. The unwatered plant wilted in two weeks.
Question: Which evidence refutes the claim?
options: Ek Soru 1 — The unwatered plant wilted
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Sulama yapılmayan bitkinin solması karşı kanıttır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the problem.
A battery-powered toy car stops quickly in cold weather.
Question: Which hypothesis is most reasonable?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Cold may reduce battery performance.
Ek Soru 1 — Wheels disappear in winter.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Soğukta pil verimi düşebilir, bilimsel açıdan mantıklıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Read the procedure.
4) Measure 103 ml water.
5) Heat 6 minutes.
6) Record temperature.
Question: Which tool is needed in step 6?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Sıcaklık thermometer ile ölçülür.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Read the trial table.
Trial 4: 15 cm
Trial 5: 14 cm
Trial 6: 16 cm
Question: What is a reasonable average?
questions.explanation:
15+14+16 toplamı 39, ortalama 15'dir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the statement.
"A conclusion should depend on collected data, not personal opinion."
Question: This highlights ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Bilimsel sonuçlar veri temellidir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]
questions.ipucu: Data ve opinion karşıtlığına dikkat et.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the project.
Students design a filter with sand, charcoal and gravel. Dirty water becomes clearer.
Question: Which process is shown?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Katmanlı sistemle suyun temizlenmesi filtrasyondur.

[GitHub Ek Test — Science]
